probed_with.pexels_auth_format: raw key in Authorization header (no Bearer prefix)

fallback_policy: Pixabay primary, Pexels fallback (per image-search skill)
banned_sources: images.unsplash.com (direct URLs from research — no API key, bypasses skill)
cdn.pixabay.com raw URLs (403 without API auth — must go through /api/ endpoint)
